title: Whispers of Horror
description: A chilling horror experience for Minecraft. This mod adds mysterious signs, terrifying events, and atmospheric scares to keep players on edge. Are you brave enough to uncover the whispers in the dark?
body:
Step into a world where every shadow hides a secret, and every sign might be your last.

Whispers of Horror brings unsettling new mechanics and terrifying features to your Minecraft world. Mysterious signs appear with cryptic messages, thunder strikes with supernatural timing, and random events keep players on edge. Designed for horror lovers, this mod aims to disturb, surprise, and challenge your perception of safety in the game.

Key Features:

Supernatural signs with hidden effects

Unpredictable lightning strikes

Random, disturbing in-game events

Creepy ambient sounds and eerie surprises

Whether you're playing solo or with friends, this mod adds a layer of psychological tension to your survival experience. Will you survive the horrors that await?
